prompt: Create a cinematic two-panel automotive action photograph in a 16:9 horizontal frame, split exactly down the center by a thin vertical black divider. Left panel: an interior cockpit shot from the passenger side of a classic compact sports car, showing one driver wearing a black racing jacket with two white sleeve stripes, black leather driving gloves, a black harness, and a small gold hoop earring. The driver has messy dark hair, their face intentionally obscured by a plain dark brown square, hands gripping the steering wheel, seated in a black RECARO-style bucket seat. The cabin is dark, tight, and realistic, with blurred forest and guardrail streaking past the window to imply speed. Right panel: a dynamic rear three-quarter tracking shot of a white Toyota MR2 AW11 late-model G-Limited Supercharger driving fast on a winding Japanese mountain road. Show the car from low behind, centered slightly right, with rectangular red taillights, black rear trim, rear spoiler, rear glass engine cover area, visible badge text including “TOYOTA MR2” and “SUPER CHARGER,” and a Japanese license plate reading 20-00. The road curves through dense green forest with metal guardrails, stone retaining walls, orange center lines, and strong motion blur on the asphalt. Use photorealistic DSLR quality, natural overcast daylight, muted green and gray tones, high shutter-speed realism mixed with panning blur, dramatic touge racing atmosphere, and no extra captions, logos, watermarks, or added vehicles.
